This system is a puzzle... It’s like they want us to
\n<Albert>Wait, there is something here. It speaks of
an interaction between 2 types of plants
the Mors Planta and Somnus Planta.
But it is... incomplete, never heard of these plants...
\n<Seline>It says that Mors Planta increases physical and
mental capacities, but at the cost of cellular
It says here that it is supposed to slow down

Look at this: there's a note about 'compatible subjects'

\n<Seline>But it cannot be just the combination of these

\n<Albert>It is the plant that Luna is studying....Luna.
It says that it temporarily cancels out the visible

It's unbelievable, but this is wonderful
\n<Silvy>It is wonderful yes, but also problematic, we
